description: CompositionLavender round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitBring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this lavender graphic tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21. The graphic of the girl on the front pays tribute to all the women who like to glam it up. Team this t-shirt with skinny jeans, sky high ankle heels and a black vest for wild night out with the girls.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
